summary: Iter 195 focused retest of the 3 items from the review request. ALL 3 PASS. Backend /api/documents now returns both the new shape (all_documents, total_documents=3, total_size=4802000, categories=['compliance','financial_plan','soa']) AND legacy (documents, total=3) at 200. DocumentVault in client mode (localStorage app_mode='client', wealth_command_compliance_v5='permanent') renders 3 document rows each with a [data-testid^=vault-request-copy-] button and ZERO [data-testid=vault-delete-btn]. DocumentVault in adviser mode renders 3 document rows each with [data-testid=vault-delete-btn] and ZERO [data-testid^=vault-request-copy-] buttons. Shape-mismatch bug from iter 194 is fully resolved.

ui_bugs.issue: Each row shows 'undefined B' for file size and 'Invalid Date' for created_at. Backend returns file_size (e.g. 2456000) and created_at (ISO), but the row component appears to read different keys (likely 'size' / a different date field). Cosmetic, not in the 3 acceptance items but worth fixing.

Three sibling category folders render with no label (only '0' count), meaning the map is emitting blank rows. Likely related to the same 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' React warning logged from DocumentVault.

integration_issues.issue: GET /api/documents/insights returns 405 Method Not Allowed (logged twice per page load: 'Error fetching insights: AxiosError'). Non-blocking for the 3 acceptance items but should be wired up or silenced.

action_items: Optional polish: fix 'undefined B' / 'Invalid Date' in DocumentVault rows by mapping doc.file_size and doc.created_at (the keys the backend actually returns).
Optional polish: fix the empty Categories list (3 blank folders with no label) and the 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' React warning from DocumentVault.
Optional: implement or stop calling GET /api/documents/insights (currently 405 on every page load, non-blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: documents.py list_documents() now returns both shapes (all_documents + legacy documents). This is the correct minimal fix and preserves backward compatibility with any older consumer.
Role gating in DocumentVault.jsx works as specified: client mode exposes vault-request-copy-* and suppresses vault-delete-btn; adviser mode is the inverse.
Remaining rough edges (undefined B / Invalid Date / empty category folders / 405 insights) are pre-existing and outside the scope of this iter 195 review.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (2/2 acceptance items: client mode + adviser mode)

seed_data_creation: None (backend auto-seeds 3 sample documents via init_sample_documents()).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 194 shape-mismatch bug is fully fixed in iter 195. GET /api/documents returns both shapes. DocumentVault renders correctly in both modes with correct role-gated action buttons. Pre-existing cosmetic issues remain in DocumentVault (undefined B file sizes, Invalid Date, empty Categories list, 405 on /api/documents/insights) but are out of scope for this iteration.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — the 3 acceptance items all pass on retest. Shape mismatch resolved by documents.py lines 100-110 returning the superset of both the new frontend-expected keys and the legacy keys.
